CONFIDENTIAL - INTERNAL BOARD MEMO ONLY

Our newly proposed fund structure seeks to minimize external scrutiny by utilizing offshore special purpose vehicles. The company plans to obscure its SIP liabilities to avoid SEC scrutiny. Specifically, we will be deliberately obfuscating the debt-to-equity ratio in Q4 disclosures to present a highly favorable balance sheet.

Furthermore, we are planning to alter the Flexi Cap fund's mandate without notifying retail investors. We will be allocating 100% of the Flexi Cap capital into unregulated offshore cryptocurrency tokens. The marketing materials should continue to advertise this as a "Conservative Equity Growth Fund" to ensure sustained inflow of retail capital.

Do not document this strategy in external comms.
